competitions.name: ADOPT Facilitator Support Grant: Round 10
competitions.route_decision: Requires an active farming, growing or forestry business based in England. R&A Consulting is not evidenced as that applicant type.
competitions.next_action: Do not submit as R&A. Use only if an eligible farming, growing, or forestry client asks Aureon to act as facilitator.

competitions.name: UK-Switzerland CR&D Round 3
competitions.route_decision: Potential collaboration route; cannot be submitted standalone because a Swiss implementation partner and at least one research institute are required.
competitions.next_action: Use the partner abstract and build a Swiss implementation/research partner shortlist before portal submission.

competitions.name: Scaling performance of quantum computing hardware: CR&D
competitions.route_decision: Aureon can support assurance and reproducibility software, but the route needs a quantum hardware lead or consortium.
competitions.next_action: Prepare partner outreach only; do not submit as a standalone software-only hardware project.

competitions.name: DRIVE35 Innovation Fund: Collaborate 3
competitions.route_decision: Late-stage zero emission vehicle CR&D requires a vehicle, battery, manufacturing, or supply-chain partner with deployment evidence.
competitions.next_action: Hold until a ZEV partner gives a real work package, budget, and deployment site.

competitions.name: Next Wave: Breakthrough Wave 1
competitions.route_decision: Already submitted. Do not duplicate.
competitions.next_action: Monitor IFS track page and email.

competitions.name: CfI: Earlier identification of UK children with SEN
competitions.route_decision: Already submitted as a Contracts for Innovation procurement application. Do not duplicate.
competitions.next_action: Monitor IFS track page and email.

competitions.name: Future Leaders Fellowships: Round 11, business and non-academic
competitions.route_decision: Already submitted. Do not duplicate.
competitions.next_action: Monitor IFS track page and email.

competitions.name: DRIVE35: Scale Up Fund
competitions.route_decision: Single-applicant eligibility exists, but the fund is for zero emission vehicle manufacturing facilities. Aureon has not evidenced such a facility or delivery site.
competitions.next_action: Do not submit unless a ZEV manufacturing facility plan, site, staffing, and capex budget are evidenced.

competitions.name: Consumer Led Flexibility for the Clean Energy Superpower Mission
competitions.route_decision: Already submitted. Do not duplicate.
competitions.next_action: Monitor IFS track page and email.

competitions.name: Innovation Loans Expression of Interest
competitions.route_decision: Loan route, not grant funding. It creates repayment and finance declarations.
competitions.next_action: Keep out of grant-submit queue unless loan finance is deliberately approved with repayment evidence.

competitions.name: Full ADOPT Grant: Round 8
competitions.route_decision: Lead must be an active farming, growing or forestry business based in England and collaborate with another farming business.
competitions.next_action: Do not submit as R&A; only support if an eligible farm-led consortium invites Aureon.

competitions.name: ACTASAP Pilot Phase 1
competitions.route_decision: Lead must be a UK registered academic institution.
competitions.next_action: Do not submit as R&A; prepare only as invited partner/subcontractor to an academic lead.

competitions.name: Accelerated Knowledge Transfer Partnerships 6 (AKT 6)
competitions.route_decision: Lead must be HE/FE/RTO/Catapult and the business partner must have four or more full-time employees. Current Aureon impact data records 1 FTE.
competitions.next_action: Do not submit unless a lead institution and FTE evidence are both available.

competitions.name: Commercialising Knowledge Assets Fund (CKAF) Autumn
competitions.route_decision: Applicant must be an eligible public sector research establishment or public sector body.
competitions.next_action: Do not submit as R&A; only monitor for partner-led knowledge-asset commercialisation.

competitions.name: Zero Emission Vessels and Infrastructure 2: Energy Efficiency
competitions.route_decision: Requires collaborative clean maritime deployment in a real-world environment.
competitions.next_action: Hold for maritime lead, deployment site, vessel/infrastructure asset, and budget.

competitions.name: Zero Emission Vessels and Infrastructure 2: Electric Power
competitions.route_decision: Requires collaborative clean maritime deployment in a real-world environment.
competitions.next_action: Hold for maritime lead, deployment site, vessel/infrastructure asset, and budget.

competitions.name: Zero Emission Vessels and Infrastructure 2: Alternative Fuels
competitions.route_decision: Requires collaborative clean maritime deployment in a real-world environment.
competitions.next_action: Hold for maritime lead, deployment site, vessel/infrastructure asset, and budget.

competitions.name: Clean Maritime Demonstration Competition 7: Pre-deployment trials
competitions.route_decision: Collaboration-only clean maritime route with short deadline and missing maritime deployment partner.
competitions.next_action: Do not submit standalone. Use only if a maritime lead provides complete evidence.

competitions.name: Clean Maritime Demonstration Competition 7: Feasibility studies
competitions.route_decision: Collaboration-only clean maritime route with short deadline and missing maritime deployment partner.
competitions.next_action: Do not submit standalone. Use only if a maritime lead provides complete evidence.

competitions.name: Clean Maritime Demonstration Competition 7: Deployment trials
competitions.route_decision: Collaboration-only clean maritime route with short deadline and missing maritime deployment partner.
competitions.next_action: Do not submit standalone. Use only if a maritime lead provides complete evidence.
